Interface ICoordinateXform3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a coordinate (projection) transform.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3E286063-BE01-48C2-BAF7-BF22E0CDC1AC")]
public interface ICoordinateXform3 : ICoordinateXform2, ICoordinateXform, IGeodataXform
